title: Command Cockpit Stage Compass
summary: Turned the existing Command Cockpit Overview module dock into a compact stage compass so module switching reads like playable stage selection without adding scroll height.
changes: Added active-stage index and stage-count CSS variables to the Overview module dock.
Added a bounded animated compass runner and module sockets for Quest, Runway, Crew, Forge, Gates, and Intel.
Scoped the visual treatment to Command Cockpit and tightened mobile runner/socket sizing so the phone stage remains compact.
Recorded the change as a platform UI unlock in the generated snapshot history.
